en: Hey mom, do you know what ridiculous means?
Hello Kevin. Ridiculous means stupid or unreasonable, and deserving to be laughed at.
Oh, I see. So, can you make a sentence using ridiculous?
Well, let's see. Do I look ridiculous in this hat?
So, here, she wonders if the hat is funny or not.
Yes, in this case, ridiculous means, funny or strange. You are right.
Oh well. Do I look ridiculous now?
